case_title: THE WESTERN TRANSMEDIA COMPANY INC. VS UNCLE SAM FOOD & BEVERAGE INC.DBA.AROMI RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $908.31 FILED BY THE WESTERN TRANSMEDIA COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UNCLE SAM FOOD & BEVERAGE INC.DBA.AROMI RESTAURANT PETILON SAMUEL AROMI INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-12-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF MAY-31-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO INCLUDE DEFT - AROMI INC. ON THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNCLE SAM FOOD & BEVERAGE INC.DBA.AROMI RESTAURANT
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PETILON SAMUEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE WESTERN TRANSMEDIA COMPANY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNCLE SAM FOOD & BEVERAGE INC.DBA.AROMI RESTAURANT PETILON SAMUEL AROMI INC. $908.31 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $984.31 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
